user.title: MeteoAlarm Configuration
user.description: Configure MeteoAlarm integration to receive weather alerts for your location.

data_description.country: The fullname of your country in English format (lowercase)
data_description.language: The ISO code of your language, please be aware that this is only possible in the current country
data_description.name: Binary sensor name

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to MeteoAlarm API. Please check your internet connection.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid country or province combination. Please verify your settings.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

abort.already_configured: This MeteoAlarm location is already configured.
